column4: AN ELECTRIC MOTORCAR OF 1924 OF THE DUTCH RAILWAYS (BD9104) 5"/127mm GAUGE
column5: THIS ELECTRIC MOTOR CAR DESIGN IS A COMBINATION OF A CARDBOARD KITSET AND DRAWING 20.03.008 AND ACCOMPANIED ARTICLE WHICH WERE PUBLISHED IN THE "MODELBOUWER" MAGAZINE.THE DESIGN OF THIS ENGINE WAS BASED ON A SINGLE DRAWING WHICH WAS PUBLISHED IN THE "MODELBOUWER" MAGAZINE DATED 15 NOVEMBER 1973 PAGES 301, 302 AND 303 AND A CARDBOARD KIT SET WHICH I BOUGHT FROM "PAPERTRAINS" J.VELDMAN HOLLAND. AN ARTICLE OF THIS ENGINE IN CARDBOARD WAS PUBLISHED IN THE "MODELBOUWER" NR 1-2003 PAGE 58 SINCE I HAD LIMITED IN FORMATION AND DETAILED PLANS OF THIS ENGINE, SOME OF THE PARTS MAY DIFFER FROM THE ORIGINAL TYPE. SOME OF THE PARTS WHICH WERE SHOWN ON THE ORIGINAL DRAWING ARE NOT SHOWN ON MY DRAWINGS. ALSO I HAVE NOT INCLUDED ANY FASTENERS. I HAVE LEFT IT UP TO THE BUILDER TO CHOOSE THE TYPE OF FASTENERS WHICH ARE SUITABLE FOR THE JOB, ALSO I HAVE NOT SPECIFIED THE MATERIALS TO BE USED. HERE AGAIN I HAVE LEFT IT TO THE BUILDER FOR THE CHOICE OF HIS MATERIALS. THE FOLLOWING PARTS ARE INCOMPLETE DUE TO THE FACT THAT NO CLEAR OR ANY DETAILED PLANS WERE SHOWN; 1) THE ROOF 2) THE PANTOGRAPHES 3) ALL THE DETAILS OF THE EQUIPMENT UNDERNEATH THE BOTTOM PLATE SINCE I DO NOT HAVE ANY ACCESS TO THE ORIGINAL ENGINE I HAD TO GUESS HOW IT MAY HAVE LOOKED LIKE. TO ENHANCE THE LOOKS OF THIS ENGINE THE FOLLOWING CAN BE ADDED: DESTINATION BOARD, IN AND EXIT SIGNS, CLASS SIGN, INTERNAL LIGHTING, HEADLAMP LIGHTING AND TOP RED LIGHTING. THIS ENGINE IS DESIGNED AS A STATIC DISPLAY. IF A BUILDER WISH TO MAKE IT MOBILE THAN MOTORS HAVE TO BE ADDED.
